description: This video explains the differences between Bitcoin and fiat money, highlighting Bitcoin's decentralized nature, limited supply, and censorship resistance compared to the centralized and censorable characteristics of fiat money.
topic_summary: Bitcoin vs. Fiat Money: Bitcoin is decentralized and has a limited supply of 21 million coins, while fiat money is centralized, has an unlimited supply, and is subject to government control and censorship [t=0:40].
